phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso del Pantheon, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del PAN-theon, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre oggi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah KEH OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto d'ingresso?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-LYET-toh ding-GRES-soh

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how old the Pantheon is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è antico il Pantheon?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh an-TEE-koh eel pan-TEH-on?

responses.english: About two thousand years, rebuilt in AD 125 by Hadrian.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah doo-eh-MEE-lah AN-nee, ree-kos-TWEE-toh nel CHEN-toh-VEN-tee-CHEEN-kweh dah KREEL-stoh dah ah-DRYAH-noh.
responses.local: Circa duemila anni, ricostruito nel 125 d.C. da Adriano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when entry tickets need to be booked
phrases.text_local: Scusi, i biglietti si prenotano online?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ee beel-YET-tee see preh-noh-TAH-noh on-LEE-neh?

responses.phonetic: see, lah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh on-LEE-neh eh ob-blee-gah-TOH-ryah.
responses.local: Sì, la prenotazione online è obbligatoria.
